creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

This port currently have no maintainer, are you willing to maintain it?

I've checked security/mbedtls and it is 2.8.2 LTS version. I'm not familiar with this software but maybe maintainer could be contacted for a possibility of adding a new port for 3x branch or an update from 2x -> 3x.

Cheers
